chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 774 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.3553/2023. 2. For hearing of main case. 17.02.2025 Mr. Muhammad Rafi, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Aamir Ali advocate for the respondent. Mr. Manzoor Hussain, advocate for the respondent. Present petition alleges illegal construction and application in such regard is available at page 19, which has been made to the SBCA. Counsel for the SBCA states that the said application shall be decided expeditiously, preferably within 15 days, after providing an opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. In view hereof, petition is disposed of. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
